heading: Regular components: qualifications, term, grade
label: 505 Regular components: qualifications, term, grade
notes: CodificationAnother section 505 was renumbered .section 500e of this title

L. 93–290, § 2

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary concerned may accept original enlistments in the Regular Army, Regular Navy, Regular Air Force, Regular Marine Corps, or Regular Coast Guard, as the case may be, of qualified, effective, and able-bodied persons who are not less than seventeen years of age nor more than forty-two years of age. However, no person under eighteen years of age may be originally enlisted without the written consent of his parent or guardian, if he has a parent or guardian entitled to his custody and control.

children.label: b
children.text: A person is enlisted in the Regular Army, Regular Navy, Regular Air Force, Regular Marine Corps, or Regular Coast Guard in the grade or rating prescribed by the Secretary concerned.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary concerned may accept original enlistments of persons for the duration of their minority or for a period of at least two but not more than eight years, in the Regular Army, Regular Navy, Regular Air Force, Regular Marine Corps, or Regular Coast Guard, as the case may be.

The Secretary concerned may accept a reenlistment in the Regular Army, Regular Navy, Regular Air Force, Regular Marine Corps, or Regular Coast Guard, as the case may be, for a period determined under this subsection.

In the case of a member who has less than 10 years of service in the armed forces as of the day before the first day of the period for which reenlisted, the period for which the member reenlists shall be at least two years but not more than eight years.

children.label: A
children.text: a specified period of at least two years but not more than eight years; or
No enlisted member is entitled to be reenlisted for a period that would expire before the end of the member’s current enlistment.

children.heading: .—Enlistments in the Space Force
children.label: e .—Enlistments in the Space Force
children.text: For enlistments in the Space Force, see sections 20301 and 20302 of this title.
